title: Common Risk Factors in Cryptocurrency
finding: Market, size, and momentum capture much of the studied crypto cross-section
research_implication: Replicate momentum and conditional size using a modern PIT universe and costs

title: Risks and Returns of Cryptocurrency
finding: Crypto returns exhibit crypto-specific momentum and network/adoption relationships
research_implication: Supports momentum and network hypotheses; not direct proof for broad cross-section

title: Trading and Arbitrage in Cryptocurrency Markets
finding: Cross-exchange price differences and segmentation are economically important
research_implication: Preserve venue identity; model transfer/default/execution frictions

title: Crypto Wash Trading
finding: Reported volume can be heavily manipulated on unregulated venues
research_implication: Reliability-weight volume; do not use all venue volume as ground truth

title: Building Trust Takes Time: Limits to Arbitrage for Blockchain-Based Assets
finding: Settlement latency and default risk constrain cross-exchange arbitrage
research_implication: Venue spreads need settlement/counterparty interpretation

title: Empirical Asset Pricing via Machine Learning
finding: Nonlinear ML can improve expected-return prediction with strict OOS design
research_implication: ML is a later challenger to transparent and regularized baselines

title: … and the Cross-Section of Expected Returns
finding: Factor proliferation requires a higher significance hurdle and multiple-testing controls
research_implication: Count all trials; use stronger evidence than ordinary p<0.05

title: Replicating Anomalies
finding: Many anomalies fail stricter replication and microcap controls
research_implication: Require liquidity/capacity controls and independent replication

authors: Bailey; Borwein; López de Prado; Zhu
title: The Probability of Backtest Overfitting
finding: Strategy selection can produce high in-sample performance and poor OOS results
research_implication: Maintain experiment census; estimate overfitting risk; prospective holdout

title: A Reality Check for Data Snooping
finding: Tests the best model while accounting for search over alternatives
research_implication: Use a reality-check style procedure for strategy/model families

title: A Test for Superior Predictive Ability
finding: Improves inference when comparing many predictive models
research_implication: Use SPA-style comparison for broad model searches

title: Optimal Versus Naive Diversification
finding: Optimization often fails to beat 1/N OOS because of estimation error
research_implication: Equal weight is a mandatory baseline

title: A Well-Conditioned Estimator for Large-Dimensional Covariance Matrices
finding: Shrinkage stabilizes high-dimensional covariance estimation
research_implication: Use shrinkage as the first covariance baseline

title: A Taxonomy of Anomalies and Their Trading Costs
finding: Trading costs and turnover mitigation materially alter anomaly performance
research_implication: Cost and capacity enter factor promotion; test buffers

title: Risk, Return, and Equilibrium: Empirical Tests
finding: Provides a classic cross-sectional regression framework
research_implication: Use date-wise cross-sectional slopes with dependence-aware errors

title: A Simple, Positive Semi-definite, Heteroskedasticity and Autocorrelation Consistent Covariance Matrix
finding: HAC covariance addresses serial dependence
research_implication: Use for factor-return and slope time series where appropriate

title: The Stationary Bootstrap
venue: Journal of the American Statistical Association
finding: Block-resampling preserves local serial dependence
research_implication: Use date-block/stationary bootstrap for portfolio metrics

title: The Tokenomics of Staking
finding: Staking participation/rewards may create crypto carry and valuation effects
research_implication: Separate staking carry hypothesis; independent replication required

title: Magical Internet Money? On-chain Cashflows and the Cross-Section of Cryptocurrency Returns
finding: On-chain protocol cash-flow valuation measures may be priced
research_implication: Phase 2 factor after taxonomy and publication-time audit

title: Crypto Risk Premia
finding: Price, liquidity, reversal, volatility and macro characteristics may matter
research_implication: Candidate factors only; do not treat as established

title: Machine Learning and the Implementable Efficient Frontier
venue: Review of Financial Studies advance article
finding: Integrates ML with transaction-cost-aware portfolio choice
research_implication: Future challenger only after simple costed baselines

title: Quantitative Evaluation of Volatility-Adaptive Trend-Following Models in Cryptocurrency Markets
finding: Combines multi-horizon trend/RSI signals with ATR scaling and adaptive exits on BTC/ETH
research_implication: Implementable exploratory challenger after simple trend and defensive baselines; independent costed replication required

title: Cryptocurrency trading: A systematic mapping study
venue: International Journal of Information Management Data Insights
finding: Maps cryptocurrency trading research topics, methods, datasets and gaps rather than specifying a tradable rule
research_implication: Use for literature taxonomy and research prioritization only; no direct strategy experiment
